hero.badge: The first platform built for chili farmers
hero.heading: Grow Better Chili with
hero.subtitle: Identify diseases instantly, track market prices in real-time, and maximize your chili farm profitability — all in one platform.

features.heading: Everything a Chili Farmer Needs
features.subtitle: Purpose-built tools for the $10.88 billion chili pepper industry. No generic farm software — this is made for you.
features.diseaseDetectorDesc: Upload a photo of your chili plant and get instant disease identification with treatment recommendations. Powered by advanced AI vision.
features.priceDashboardDesc: Track chili prices across regions in real-time. Get alerts when prices spike or drop. Never sell at the wrong time again.
features.growingCalendarDesc: Personalized planting schedules by variety and location. Step-by-step guides from seedling to harvest with disease prevention tips.
features.profitCalculatorDesc: Calculate your expected profit before planting. Input costs, estimate yields, and see if this season is worth it.

cta.heading: Stop Losing Harvest to Disease
cta.subtitle: Join ChiliHub today. Upload a photo of your sick chili plant and get AI-powered diagnosis in seconds. Free to start.
cta.note: No credit card required. 3 free scans every month.

scan.title: AI Disease Scanner
scan.subtitle: Upload a photo of your chili plant to detect diseases instantly
scan.limitReached: Scan limit reached. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited scans.
scan.analysisFailed: Analysis failed. Please try again with a clearer photo.
scan.dropPhoto: Drop your chili plant photo here
scan.orBrowse: or click to browse (JPG, PNG, WebP)

calculator.title: Profitability Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Calculate if chili farming is profitable this season
calculator.inputNote: Default values in IDR (Indonesian Rupiah). Adjust to your local costs.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your ChiliHub account
auth.signUpSubtitle: Start monitoring your chili crops with AI

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more power.
pricing.freeDesc: Get started with basic disease detection
pricing.proDesc: Unlimited scanning and full dashboard access
pricing.businessDesc: For commercial growers and farm managers
